description:
STERI-7 is a high-level, broad spectrum, one stage disinfectant cleaner. When applied to any surface from a floor to a wall or even a fabric, the biocide in STERI-7 kills Bacteria, Spores, Fungi, Viruses and Mould in seconds. But unlike any other disinfectant, STERI-7 incorporates a unique innovation called Reactive Barrier Technology._x000D_
_x000D_
Reactive Barrier Technology is a specialised micro emulsion which provides an optional sustained release system - this means that the Reactive Barrier can be turned on or off depending on the situation. It's simple, if you rinse STERI-7 after application you remove the Reactive Barrier, if you leave STERI-7 to dry you enable the Reactive Barrier Technology giving you added biosecurity and protection between cleans.

At the heart of the Historic Dockyard Chatham, Master Ropemakers maintains a process of ropemaking that dates back on this site for more than 400 years._x000D_
_x000D_
We still use the 1/4 mile long rope walk and machinery from the Victorian era, as well as on more modern equipment including our testing house, to make our rope. We use natural and synthetic fibres in manufacture and our team of craftsmen not only make rope but work with it: splicing knotting, net making, mooring ropes and creating bespoke products to customer requirements._x000D_
_x000D_
The tradition of producing the finest ropes for the Royal Navy Ships including the most legendary, HMS Victory (built here at Chatham), continues today with a range of new markets. Today your custom keeps the ropewalk busy to the evident delight of visitors who witness the process themselves.

Welcome to Grub Club - we do pet food a little differently. 

The pet food industry produces over 100m tonnes of CO2 emissions every year. Pretty bonkers, we know. So we set out on a mission to provide superfood nutrition to our pets, without the carbon footprint.

How do we do this? Well, we've replaced the traditional sources of protein found in pet food with insect protein. Insect farming requires a fraction of the land and water, and produce significantly less emissions than traditional livestock farming. Even better - they're farmed in a zero waste, circular system - upcycling organic waste like fruit and veg into high quality nutrition!

Great for our pets, great for our planet.

description:
In a world racing to teach machines how to think, 
Kalpana Chandran founded Quantum Leapers to help humans remember how to start with purpose, lead with heart, and stand in uncertainty with courage.

Because the real edge today isn't artificial intelligence -  
It's authentic intention.

Quantum Leapers doesn't aim to restore what was. 
We exist to reinvent what's possible.

We may not reverse the drift -  
But we redefine what progress means.

This next chapter will either be written by fear of change, 
Or by conscious leadership that puts people at the centre of innovation.

Through science-backed mindset transformation, 
We help leaders and organisations unlock results from the inside out.

In the age of automation, 
Mindset is our greatest lever.

We don't teach people how to outpace AI. 
We build the kind of leaders AI will never replace.

Cryogenic Ltd is the leading supplier of high field superconducting magnets and low temperature measurement systems (down to 30 mK).

We are actively committed to developing new products for our existing and future customers. These include our wide range of Cryogen Free Magnet systems and Variable Temperature Inserts which are easy to operate and offer significant operational cost benefits.

Our aim is to deliver the latest technology without unnecessary cosmetic features. We put great emphasis on robust construction and the best use of materials. Many of our measurement systems, magnet power supplies and cryostats are still in everyday use after more than 20 years. We believe in providing the back-up our customers expect with the personal and responsible approach to be expected of professionals with more than 30 years experience in magnetism and low temperature systems.


• Cryogenic supplies instruments and equipment for many applications, these include;

• Measurement systems with VSM, AC susceptibility, resistivity, Hall effect, heat capacity,  thermal conductivity and Seebeck effect.
    
• SQUID instruments for highly sensitive magnetometers

• Research magnets systems with fields to 20 Tesla or more using HTS insert coils

• NMR, MRI and ESR magnets and systems including gradient coils RF probes and consoles

• UHV beam-line target magnets and Neutron setting magnets

• Ultra low temperature He3 and DR systems to 30 mK with rotating platforms

• Low temperature platforms for STM and AFM systems to 30 mK

→ The gap that opens at deal close.
In the first 30 days after a platform acquisition, an add-on, or a new CEO appointment, the gap between the investment thesis and the story the organisation is telling becomes a measurable problem. The 100-day plan is running. The narrative is not. Every day that gap stays open, it fills by default - in the answers employees give customers, in the confidence investors form, and in the ground that becomes harder to recover the longer it is left.

→ The space between deal close & execution.
MistryX is a commercial narrative and positioning firm. We work with Operating Partners and incoming CEOs at mid-market PE-backed businesses. Every engagement is built from the investment thesis down, pressure-tested from the outside in.

The transaction is closed. The value creation plan is activating. In that window, the commercial foundation is either set deliberately or inherited by default. We are called in to ensure it is set deliberately.

→ Both partners. Every engagement. In person.
At acquisition, internal perspectives are closely held, and the investment thesis is not yet translated into operational language.

The advisory value at this moment is not analysis. It is the ability to synthesise complexity fast, challenge the existing narrative from an independent position, and produce a confirmed commercial direction before the organisation fills the gap by default.

→ The work is done in the room. Not after it.
Both managing partners arrive with an independent point of view formed from the investment thesis. We work directly alongside the Operating Partner and CEO - challenging assumptions, surfacing what the organisation cannot see from the inside, and co-constructing the commercial foundation with the people who will own and deploy it. The highest-stakes commercial decisions of the holding period are resolved in the room, not through documents and calls.

Clarity is not optional. It is the condition for the value creation plan to move.

blng studio is an architecture-led, multi-disciplinary design studio based in London and working internationally. 

Building on the legacy of a family practice founded in 1955 in Kassel, Germany, the studio is led by Ariadna and Leo Bieling, the third generation of the Bieling family. Their combined cultural perspectives- Mexican warmth and German-British-inform a design language that balances precision, materiality, and human connection.

The studio combines heritage with creative curiosity-crafting human-centred architecture, environments, and objects that connect people and context. We see design as inquiry, an exploration that combines function and delight - architecture is one expression of what we do. 

We craft spaces people feel connected to-and return to.

The next edition of The Treasure House Fair will take place at the Royal Hospital Chelsea from 26 June - 1 July 2025.

The Fair continues the 90 year tradition of an annual show of exceptional art during the height of British Summer. Celebrating the strength of London as a centre for all disciplines of collecting, bringing together exhibitors and collectors from around the world.

Royal Vauxhall Tavern is an iconic cabaret, performance and club night venue and one of London's most successful independently owned companies. Culturally, historically and reputationally established as an industry leader and a preferred venue of choice for many leading artists, promoters and the LGBTQ community. 

Sold the J/V freehold interest in Nov 2014, in a multi-million pound sale, retaining the leasehold interest, transformed the business to generate £2.3M annual turnover. An company valuation/individual shareholding in June 2023 placed the company valuation at £4.2M.

• Created certainty and enriched brand and reputational status as an award winning venue to the London entertainment industry

• Raised over £700,000 through fundraising, supporting LGBTQ+ charitable causes

• Major contributor to London night-time economy, preferred venue of choice by leading international artists including Belinda Carlisle, Paul O Grady/Lilly Savage, Mutya Buena, Gabrielle, Bucks Fizz, Liberty X, The Three Degrees, Sonia, Mica Paris, Toyah, T'Pau, and many more

Wise is a global technology company, building the best way to move money around the world. 

With the Wise account people and businesses can hold 40+ currencies, move money between countries and spend money abroad. Large companies and banks use Wise technology too; an entirely new cross-border payments network that will one day power money without borders for everyone, everywhere. However you use the platform, Wise is on a mission to make your life easier and save you money.

Co-founded by Kristo Käärmann and Taavet Hinrikus, Wise launched in 2011 under its original name TransferWise. It is one of the world's fastest growing, profitable technology companies and is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker, WISE.

16 million people and businesses use Wise globally, which processes £9 billion in cross-border transactions every month, saving customers around £1.5 billion a year.

Our shop showcases cheese from our cellars, along with a selection of delicious accompaniments and a wine selection chosen with cheese-pairing in mind.
